note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left plantar wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left plantar measures 1.6 cm x 2.7 cm x 1.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 31% slough, 69% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: none. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left plantar — not improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Offloading boot applied.
